name: Statuspage
description: This app is an Atlassian product that is used to help monitor and communicate status issues for various products

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Provide text to search in the incident name, status, postmortem body and incident_updates fields

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to return per page (default and max: 100)

parameters.name: page_offset
parameters.description: Page offset to fetch

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: Incident Identifier

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: Incident Identifier

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address for creating email subscriber

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Incident Name

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Incident status. Default is investigating

parameters.name: impact_override
parameters.description: Select value to override calculated impact value

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Write a initial message, created as the first incident update

parameters.name: component_ids
parameters.description: Specify component's id affected by this incident. Separate multiple ids with commas

parameters.name: components
parameters.description: A JSON object of 'component affected' and 'status'
